<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/es.php', [ 'first_day_of_week' => 0, 'formats' => [ 'LT' => 'h:mm a', 'LTS' => 'h:mm:ss a', 'L' => 'D/M/yy', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', 'LLL' => 'D [de] MMMM [de] YYYY h:mm a', 'LLLL' => 'dddd, D [de] MMMM [de] YYYY h:mm a', ], ]);
